sizing_rule.note: Position size = Account Equity / $29.41 per share. Optimal f derived from equalized/normalized historical trade data (not raw P&L). This is a fixed dollar-per-unit approach anchored to optimal f mathematics. The $29.41 figure represents the mathematically optimal capital allocation unit.

source_rule_text: Buy one share of stock for every $29.41 in account equity, adjusting position size as equity changes, using equalized optimal f determined from normalized trade data rather than raw P&L data.
